source.title: A small-molecule TNIK inhibitor targets fibrosis in preclinical and clinical models
source.note: TNIK is the nominated target in the IPF case study; later clinical progression must remain evaluation-only context, not a discovery-time feature.

forbidden_feature_leakage: later in vivo validation from the same paper

notes: Use TNIK as a source-backed positive target for discovery-time evaluation only.
